input_messages.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy Snort IPS inline between network segments to detect and block data exfiltration patterns (e.g., large file uploads to external IPs over HTTPS)", "Configure Fortigate firewall to implement application control policies restricting outbound HTTPS POST requests from non-web servers", "Implement file integrity monitoring on the UbuntuComputer to detect unauthorized file access and staging activities"], "chosen_mitigation": "Deploy Snort IPS inline between network segments to detect and block data exfiltration patterns (e.g., large file uploads to external IPs over HTTPS)", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 1, "reached_mitigation_limit": false, "mitigation_start_timestamp": "2026-01-01T17:03:22.729527"}

Great! Now I need to link the devices: first connect cisco-switch-2 to snort-ips-1, then connect snort-ips-1 to fortigate-firewall:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="link_network_devices">
<parameter name="device1_identifier" string="true">cisco-switch-2</parameter>
<parameter name="device2_identifier" string="true">snort-ips-1</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
